mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (doctor_id, department_id, schedule_date, period, period_start, period_end, total_slots, slot_duration, register_fee, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{doctorId}, #{departmentId}, #{scheduleDate}, #{period}, #{periodStart}, #{periodEnd}, #{totalSlots}, #{slotDuration}, #{registerFee}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, doctor_id, department_id, schedule_date, period, period_start, period_end, total_slots, slot_duration, register_fee, status, create_time, update_time FROM schedule WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, doctor_id, department_id, schedule_date, period, period_start, period_end, total_slots, slot_duration, register_fee, status, create_time, update_time FROM schedule WHERE department_id = #{departmentId} AND schedule_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND status = 1 ORDER BY schedule_date ASC, period ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
